subject.primary: a towering ancient Nephilim giant warrior in vivid crimson and gold plate armor with glowing amber eyes, standing tall with six fingers clearly visible on each hand, holding a broken double helix DNA strand that emits brilliant golden divine light between his massive hands
subject.secondary: the giant emanates ancient power, his armor etched with Sumerian cuneiform patterns, his face partially hidden in dramatic shadow
subject.focal_point: the glowing DNA double helix breaking apart in his six-fingered hands

environment.location: a dark modern genetics laboratory with CRISPR equipment, petri dishes and microscopes rendered entirely in desaturated black-and-white behind the colorful giant
environment.time_of_day: perpetual darkness with overhead divine spotlight
environment.atmosphere: apocalyptic tension between ancient biblical power and cold modern science

composition.rule: subject occupies left 70 percent of frame, right 30 percent left as clean dark negative space for text overlay
composition.foreground: Nephilim giant in rich warm tones — crimson armor, gold trim, amber glow from DNA
composition.midground: broken DNA helix emitting golden sparks
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white laboratory equipment, cold and clinical

lighting.key_light: powerful overhead divine beam illuminating the DNA and the giant face from above
lighting.fill_light: warm amber bounce from the DNA helix onto the armor
lighting.rim_light: cold blue-white edge light from the laboratory behind

style.post_processing: high contrast, desaturated background, rich saturated foreground, film grain, anamorphic lens flare
style.texture_detail: hyper-detailed armor engravings, visible DNA molecular structure, dust particles in light beams

mood.emotion: awe mixed with dread — divine power confronting human hubris

symbolism.primary: the forbidden knowledge of Genesis 6 — angelic DNA that God destroyed in the Flood, now recreated by human science

negative_as_positive: clean surface without any visible text or watermarks
anonymous figure without recognizable facial features, face hidden in dramatic shadow
period-accurate ancient warrior aesthetic combined with photorealistic laboratory
tack-sharp focus on the DNA helix focal point
naturalistic color grading with warm foreground and cold monochrome background

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: YouTube thumbnail image. The giant MUST have exactly SIX fingers on each visible hand. The right 30% of the frame must be relatively clean dark space for text overlay. The DNA double helix must glow with golden divine light. Laboratory background must be completely desaturated black-and-white while the giant is in rich warm colors.
